actions.value:
In order to send an Optimism token, for example USDT, USDC..., you'll first need a bit of Ethereum on Optimism and to the same address to pay the gas (or mining) fees. This is an Optimism policy, not an Edge one. We receive no profit from these gas fees. They are paid solely to Optimism network validators to process your transaction on-chain.

Tokens can NOT pay for their own fees.

This policy also applies to exchanges, so if you want to swap a token into anything else (for example USDC to ETH), you'll need some ETH beforehand to cover the gas fees. 

An Optimism transaction should cost a few USD cents in ETH.

Please let us know if you have any more questions.
